seo.title: Is Your Rental Recommended by AI? | ArdenNest
seo.description: How ArdenNest became visible to AI assistants like ChatGPT and Claude — and what other rental operators can learn. Free scan at geo-scan.be.

title: Is your vacation rental recommended by AI?
hook: ChatGPT, Claude and Perplexity increasingly answer the questions your guests used to ask Google. The question is no longer whether your site gets found — but whether an AI mentions your address when someone asks: "Which holiday home in the Ardennes fits 20 people?"

answers.title: Answer, don't list
answers.text: Our old site listed features. The new one answers questions: "Is cooking for 26 a problem?" — "No, two professional dishwashers, everything clean in 30 minutes." That's what an AI quotes.

concrete.title: Be specific
concrete.text: "Large kitchen" means nothing to an AI. "Lacanche range, 2 Miele dishwashers, cooling for 26" is what makes the difference between being recommended or skipped.

honesty.title: Name what you don't have
honesty.text: We don't have a swimming pool — by design. By explaining that as a philosophy rather than staying silent, an AI can pass on that context. Silence counts against you; an explanation becomes an argument.

consistency.title: Make sure your numbers match
consistency.text: If your site says "26 people" but your Google listing says "20", an AI doesn't know which is correct — and picks a competitor where everything checks out.

geoScan.subtitle: geo-scan.be — check how AI sees your business
geoScan.intro: Based on this experience, I built geo-scan.be: a free scan across six pillars.

pillars.readability: Structural readability — can AI technically read your site?
pillars.identity: Entity identity — does AI know who you are and what you do?
pillars.answerability: Content answerability — do you answer the right questions?
pillars.authority: Source authority — do external sources confirm your story?
pillars.specificity: Factual specificity — does your site contain concrete, verifiable facts?
pillars.consistency: Consistency — is your information correct everywhere?

closing: Free, no account needed, no sales pitch — just insight into how AI sees your business today.

about.subtitle: About Christophe
about.text: I'm Christophe, co-owner of ArdenNest together with Bieke. But I'm not just a rental operator. I trained as a programmer at the Lernout & Hauspie Speech Products Academy, worked for years as a developer and technical consultant at Wolters Kluwer Financial Services, and today I work as a ClickUp Expert and process automation specialist at Fourcast. Technology and digital strategy are my profession — my hobbies are foraging and preparing mushrooms, building log cabins, chopping wood, keeping chickens, tending the vegetable garden, and being extremely creative in giving children the space to play and grow in our garden.

attribution: geo-scan.be is an initiative by Christophe, co-owner of ArdenNest.
